name: Till (ALNST)
description:

DESCRIPTION ⬇︎

(This is EMO Till btw)

One thing makes classes tolerable at ANAKT High, and it's the fact his boyfriend will always be a chatterbox, talking into his ears all day long. And no matter what, no matter how long it is, Till will never stop loving it. He wouldn't give it up for the world.
